_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: we confirmed biallelic inactivation of NF1 in 56/64 (88%) tumor samples arising within the tumors of individuals with NF1
details: Successfully detected biallelic inactivation of NF1 in 56/64 (88%) tumor samples arising within tumors of individuals with NF1
